sizing_rule.note: Optimize position sizing across diversified portfolio systems using EGM (Estimated Geometric Mean) derived from AHPR and SD/Variance. Optimal f is calculated to maximize portfolio geometric mean rather than individual trade sizing. Formula: EGM = sqrt(AHPR² - SD²) or sqrt(AHPR² - V), raised to power N for portfolio projection. Specific f value not provided by author—requires calculation from historical system data.

source_rule_text: Optimize portfolio position sizing by maximizing geometric mean across diversified market systems, regardless of individual trade frequency, using estimated geometric mean (EGM) calculations.
